subcodes.first_line: O servant of that Beloved of the horizons! When the Light of the Covenant, like unto a ray, shone forth upon the sanctuary of the people of illumination, the dawn of unity appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آندلبر آفاق نور میثاق چون پرتوی برواق اهل اشراق زد بارقه وفاق طلوع
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
